div.head: Governor of the Province
div.p: Sir: The assassination of the illustrious republican, Abraham Lincoln, President of the United States, has caused in Buenos Ayres the most profound regret.

The governor of this province the same as all his countrymen, moved by this execrable crime, sympathizes most heartily with your excellency for the misfortune that casts into mourning that joy caused by the recent victories obtained, that would secure the union and liberty of the great republic you so nobly represent.
May it please your excellency to accept the sympathy of this province, and the respect that I have always had for the eminent citizen that the country of your excellency has just lost.
I salute your excellency with most distinguished esteem.
div.closer:
MARIANO SAAVEDRA,
Governor of the Province of Buenos Ayres.

postscript.p:
His Excellency Hon. Robert C. Kirk,
Minister Resident of the United States of America.
